CodeBlockMethod.Name: TeleportToMap
CodeBlockMethod.Code:
local player = _UserService.LocalPlayer if player == nil then end
--_TeleportService:TeleportToMapPosition(player, Vector3.zero, self.TargetMapName) _TeleportService:TeleportToMapPosition(player, Vector3(-3, 2.5, 0), self.TargetMapName)

CodeBlockEntityEventHandler.Name: HandleButtonClickEvent
CodeBlockEntityEventHandler.Code:
self:TeleportToMap()
local bgmRUID = "0428442a33fd48a193a1a39c1602cf0c" local volume = 1.0 _SoundService:PlayBGM(bgmRUID, volume)
